title: Master's Program in International Relations Application and Fees
content:
Master's Program in International Relations Application and Fees

2025-2026 Fall Semester Online Applications will start on 02.06.2025.

Application Deadline: 27.07.2025, Sunday

The Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

PROGRAM FEES:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fee

ALES Score Type: EQUAL WEIGHT

INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS MASTER'S PROGRAM (THESIS)

FOR THE INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS MASTER'S PROGRAM (THESIS), THE SCIENCE EXAM WILL NOT BE TAKEN AT 2025-2026 FALL SEMESTER STUDENTS ACCEPTANCE.

In order to apply to the program (thesis), candidates must have taken the ALES exam and must have received at least 55 points from the Equal Weight point type.

In Master's Programs (Thesis), 65% of the ALES in the relevant score type and 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average will be additioned and placed in the ranking.

The applications of the candidates of those who don’t apply online or hadn’t graduate at the time of application, or those who don’t upload the ALES document of the last 5 years for the thesis program and the document showing the undergraduate graduation grade point average to the application system will be deemed invalid.

Lessons in this program are held in the evening hours on weekdays.

Who can apply to the International Relations Master's Program?

Anyone with a 4-year undergraduate degree can apply to the program within the quota. In case the applicants from departments other than social sciences are accepted, the Program Coordinator may determine Scientific Preparation courses in order to provide the academic infrastructure required by the master's program.
